mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_nm, email, telno, hp_no, comp_id, dept_id, workplace_id, role_id, user_stat, user_emp_nmb FROM user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_info SET user_nm = #{userNm}, email = #{email}, telno = #{telno}, hp_no = #{hpNo} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
